I removed some certs because it's what the client wanted
They also want the RAL one fully visible with the housee even if it's tall let's fix that and don't hardocde the order css aspect ratio hack we need to add per badge class and do it that way we might change the order in the future so we need to do that maybe make them all equally big analyze with playwright!!!

now we need to add the creditform
to the end keep the creditfrom color but we need to add it to the sprite for efficiency here's the code for it and while we're at it we can see if we havey any stale icons or anything and get rid of them and remove them and while we're at it how should we deal with the boholz favicon should we get rid of the bg and just let it change color based on the browser bg is that reliable? please brainstorm this and implement because if a user has the browser set to say prefer color scheem dark the browser bg will automatically be dark so there's no point in adding the bg over the logo but we have our color schemes already defined I guess with our contrast surface and content scheme so what is the pro approach also what I think we MUST DO IS MAKE THE FAVICON BIGGER SOMEHOW MAYBE GET RID OF THE HOUSE AND JUST MAKE THE BOHOLZ BIGGER BECAUSE IT CAN'T BE SEEN
